title: Decken Demands Shirahoshi
description: On pages 16–17, this part follows Unknown person #1, Royal Guards, Narrator, Marines, Fish-Men, Jinbe, Shirahoshi. The core story beat is decken demands shirahoshi.
scene: The scene centers on decken demands shirahoshi, with Unknown person #1, Royal Guards, Narrator, Marines, Fish-Men, Jinbe, Shirahoshi driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Of course, your majesty! We will go after hordy and his crew at -

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that I am in no shape to fight, attempting to do battle with them would only result in meaningless sacrifices.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: We will surrender the Palace for now, regroup with the princes, and await the right opportunity to counterattack!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Surrender the Palace?! Your majesty, are you quite certain?!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: What does zero think he's doing?! Fighting a fishman in the water is suicide...!

summary: Decken Demands Shirahoshi. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
